antipattern.description: Models / views / settings at repo root with no apps/ partitioning.
antipattern.reason: Cannot scale beyond ~3 features without import cycles. Code search and CI gates regress to manual.

antipattern.description: `from apps.users.models import User` next to `from apps.organizations.models import User` in the same module.
antipattern.reason: Second import silently shadows the first. The bug is detectable only via tests that happen to exercise both.

antipattern.description: Multi-step ORM writes inside the view body.
antipattern.reason: Views become untestable in isolation, business logic locked to HTTP transport, retry / async migration blocked.
Argument swap goes undetected by type checker; silent data corruption.

antipattern.description: Status stored as plain string literals scattered across the codebase.
antipattern.reason: Typos pass validation, refactor cost compounds, translations are impossible.
Writes all fields; signals fire unnecessarily; concurrent writers stomp each other.
